시편 142:1.content: I cry with my voice to Yahweh. With my voice, I ask Yahweh for mercy.

시편 142:2.content: I pour out my complaint before him. I tell him my troubles.

시편 142:3.content: When my spirit was overwhelmed within me, you knew my route. On the path in which I walk, they have hidden a snare for me.

시편 142:4.content: Look on my right, and see; for there is no one who is concerned for me. Refuge has fled from me. No one cares for my soul.

시편 142:5.content: I cried to you, Yahweh. I said, “You are my refuge, my portion in the land of the living.”

시편 142:6.content: Listen to my cry, for I am in desperate need. Deliver me from my persecutors, for they are too strong for me.

시편 142:7.content: Bring my soul out of prison, that I may give thanks to your name. The righteous will surround me, for you will be good to me.
